news.t: Defiance's XMAG ETF, the First ETF Offering Exposure to the S&P 500 Excluding the “Magnificent Seven,” Surpasses $100 Million in AUM
Defiance's XMAG ETF Outshines S&P 500 Amid “Magnificent 7” Crash, Proving Its Value as a Diversification Powerhouse
Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
Defiance Launches XMAG The First ETF Offering Exposure to the S&P 500 Excluding the “Magnificent 7” Tech Giants
This ETF Has Every Stock in the S&P 500 Except the Mag 7

holdings.infoBox: XMAG is an equity ETF with a total of 496 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 4.05%, Micron Technology at 2.51%, Eli Lilly and Company at 2.20%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 1.96%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 1.89%.

overview.description: The Defiance Large Cap ex-Mag 7 ETF (XMAG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA US 500 ex-Magnificent 7 index. The fund tracks an index that provides exposure to large-cap stocks in the US, excluding the seven largest technology stocks. The strategy aims to mitigate the overconcentration and volatility of a select few stocks XMAG was launched on Oct 21, 2024 and is issued by Defiance.
